features.name: module with input and output wire ports
features.description: Code should include a module with input wire and output wire port declarations where the internal port_index field access occurs before initialization

features.name: module with function containing multiplication
features.description: Code should include a module with automatic function definitions that perform multiplication operations on large bit-width operands

features.name: module with reg signals and always block with reset
features.description: Code should include a module with reg signal declarations and an always block with asynchronous reset that initializes multiple pipeline stage registers
